case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. TOMMIE BORDELON et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BORDELON, TOMMIE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BORDELON, TOMMIE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT BORDELON, TOMMIE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ORIGINAL SUMMONS RETURNED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED NOV-01-2003, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BORDELON, TOMMIE
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT RE ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BORDELON, TOMMIE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BORDELON, TOMMIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 130 BROOKDALE AVE. S.F. CA., LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
